title: RCTD-347 Naked Oil Cat Lesbian Fight - Arisu Mizushima

Pull your hair, strangle your neck, and swear! Moe Hazuki blames like a grinning yankee, and Arisu Mizushima cuts off with a cool expression. A very contrasting clash between the two!
